HGSS.366.0000:
Lyra: [0103,0000,0000]!
You can catch wild Pokémon\r
with Poké Balls.\f
Follow me!\f
HGSS.366.0001:
Ethan: [0103,0000,0000]!
You can catch wild Pokémon\r
with Poké Balls.\f
Follow me!\f
HGSS.366.0002:
...Just like that!\f
...
Huh? Was I too fast?\f
I’ll try again. Come this way!\f
HGSS.366.0003:
See? Just like that!\f
It’s better to lower your
target’s HP more than I did,\r
or make it sleep or something.\f
You can try all kinds of things
to see what works.\f
I’ll give you these. Good luck!\f

HGSS.366.0009:
Hey, how are your Pokémon?\f
If they’re weak and not ready for
battle, keep out of the tall grass.
HGSS.366.0010:
Do you see those ledges?
It’s scary to jump off them.\f
But you can go to New Bark Town
without walking through tall grass.
HGSS.366.0011:
I wanted to take a break, so I
saved to record my progress.
HGSS.366.0012:
I’m waiting for Pokémon that
appear only in the daytime.
HGSS.366.0013:
I’m waiting for Pokémon that
appear only at night.
HGSS.366.0014:
I’m waiting for Pokémon that
appear only in the morning.

Rt. 29
